source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Two half-cells are set up as follows:

Half-Cell A: Strip of Cu(s) in $CuNO_3(aq)$

Half-Cell B: Strip of Zn(s) in $Zn(NO_3)_2(aq)$

When the cells are connected according to the following diagram, the following reaction occurs. How many moles of electrons must be transferred to create 127 g of copper?
extraction_notes: answer field is numeric "1", but the record does not clarify whether it is a 0-based or 1-based choice index, so the raw answer is preserved
image field contains an in-memory PIL image descriptor rather than a path, filename, or URL
source_intake_record.subject: Chemistry

image_dependency: 题干明确写到“according to the following diagram”，且 `requires_image=true`。
`text_dominant=false`，上游标注倾向认为该题不是纯文本主导。
但题干文字已给出两半电池物质与目标产物，核心化学计量信息并非完全缺失，说明图像依赖可能不是满分级别。
multi_step: 需要先根据 `CuNO_3(aq)` 判断生成铜时每摩尔铜对应的电子数。
还需要把 127 g 铜换算为物质的量，再与电子计量关系结合。
最终答案是明确数值型结果，体现出至少两步以上的化学计量推理。
verifiability: `answer_type=short_text`，答案为明确的数值短语“2 moles of electrons”。
同时提供了 4 个选择项，目标答案边界清晰，便于规则核验。
`registry_passed=true`，且题目、答案、图像资产都已登记存在。

decision_reasons: 题干、答案、图像资产齐全，且注册检查通过，没有明显资产缺口。
可核验性高，答案是明确的短文本数值结果，选择项边界清晰。
题目需要结合图示与化学计量进行多步推理，样本信息量和题目质量较好。
虽有 image_dependency_ambiguous 风险，但当前核心语义并未缺失，不构成降为低优先级或拒绝的充分理由。

normalized_value.title: Dataset Open Question
normalized_value.rewritten_question_text:
Two half-cells are set up as follows:

Half-Cell A: Strip of Cu(s) in $CuNO_3(aq)$

Half-Cell B: Strip of Zn(s) in $Zn(NO_3)_2(aq)$

When the cells are connected according to the following diagram, the following reaction occurs. How many moles of electrons must be transferred to create 127 g of copper?

agent_assessment.rationale: The question text clearly asks for the moles of electrons needed to produce 127 g of copper, and the image provides a readable galvanic-cell diagram plus the net reaction that clarifies the copper ion stoichiometry. Together they are semantically clear and sufficient for annotation.

cleaning_records.decision_rationale: The sample is complete and understandable, the image support is clear enough to clarify the electrochemical reaction, the rewritten open question is usable, and alignment and solvability show no serious issues.
